name: Neo Geo
description: SNK's cartridge-based arcade and home platform family, shared across MVS arcade hardware and AES home consoles with largely identical games.

eras.title: Premium Arcade Era
eras.description: Early Neo Geo period establishing SNK's premium cartridge arcade and home identity.

eras.title: Fighting Game Peak Era
eras.description: The King of Fighters, Fatal Fury, Samurai Shodown, and Metal Slug define the platform's strongest identity.

eras.title: Late Neo Geo Era
eras.description: Late releases continue the MVS/AES library before SNK fully moves beyond the platform.
